mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twin_access_correlation_pending (access_type, user_id, room_id, source_tag, automation_log_id, summary_zh, detail_zh, op_time, consumed) VALUES (#{accessType}, #{userId}, #{roomId}, #{sourceTag}, #{automationLogId}, #{summaryZh}, #{detailZh}, #{opTime}, COALESCE(#{consumed}, 0))
